name: ChartSpark

releases.author: Pooyash1998
releases.description:
## ChartSpark v0.1.0 — Initial Release

Turn tables, checkboxes, and key:value data in your Obsidian notes into interactive charts with a single shortcut.

### What's included

**Chart types**
- Bar, Horizontal Bar, Line, Pie, Doughnut, Radar, Polar Area

**Smart data detection**
- Markdown tables with numeric, boolean (`true`/`false`), currency (`$1,200`), and percentage (`42%`) columns
- Checkbox lists — auto-calculates completed vs remaining
- Key : value pairs
- JSON objects and arrays

**Table column picker**
- Choose exactly which column is the category axis and which columns are value series
- ⇄ Swap axes to transpose rows and columns instantly
- Live chart preview updates as you configure

**Multi-block support**
- Notes with multiple data blocks show a picker so you always chart the right one

**Live auto-refresh**
- Charts re-render when source data changes
- Each chart tracks its own source block by ID — multiple charts in the same note refresh independently

**Quality of life**
- × delete button on hover
- Manual ↻ refresh button (optional)
- PNG export
- Vault-wide checkbox aggregation
- Theme-aware (light and dark mode)
- `Cmd/Ctrl + Shift + C` keyboard shortcut
releases.name: ChartSpark v0.1.0
